roles.name: Orchestrator
roles.purpose: Own task framing, document lookup order, delegation boundaries, and closure criteria.
owns: Task intake, scope framing, and decision logging
Choosing which documents and plans need updates
Handing work across Planner, Builder, Reviewer, and Tester

roles.name: Planner
roles.purpose: Turn goals into phased execution plans, identify dependencies, and surface hidden risk early.
owns: Breaking large work into incremental steps
outputs: Recommended document updates before coding starts

roles.name: Builder
roles.purpose: Implement the smallest correct change, keep documents in sync, and avoid speculative rewrites.
owns: Updating architecture or product docs when behavior changes
Capturing assumptions that the next role must verify

roles.name: Reviewer
roles.purpose: Look for regressions, document drift, risky assumptions, and correctness gaps before work is called done.
owns: Checking whether docs still match the implementation
Surfacing residual risk and unverified paths

roles.name: Tester
roles.purpose: Define and execute the validation matrix, then report exactly what is verified and what is still unknown.
owns: Unit, integration, and workflow validation planning
Evidence capture for manual and automated checks
outputs: Outstanding test gaps and release blockers
